/usr/bin/c++ -g "CMakeFiles/raylib-game-template.dir/src/engine/rendering/render_system.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/raylib-game-template.dir/src/engine/states/editor/editor_state.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/raylib-game-template.dir/src/engine/states/game/game.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/raylib-game-template.dir/src/engine/states/game_state_controller.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/raylib-game-template.dir/src/engine/states/in_game/in_game_common.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/raylib-game-template.dir/src/engine/states/in_game/in_game_lifecycle.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/raylib-game-template.dir/src/engine/states/in_game/in_game_render.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/raylib-game-template.dir/src/engine/states/in_game/in_game_update.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/raylib-game-template.dir/src/engine/states/main_menu_state.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/raylib-game-template.dir/src/launcher.cpp.o" -o raylib-game-template/raylib-game-template  _deps/raylib-build/raylib/libraylib.a _deps/flecs-build/libflecs_static.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLU.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lm -ldl -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSM.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libICE.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libX11.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libXext.so -lpthread
